output: Implemented T4 by routing the in-scope single-task readers and writers through one canonical React Query plus realtime-store seeding path. `useGetTask` now preserves `resolveTaskProjectScope()` and empty-id disabling while returning narrow store snapshots when available, seeding scoped task snapshots from cached or fetched query results, and keeping React Query authoritative for fetch lifecycle. Updated `useTaskPrefetch`, generation-task cache helpers, `RealtimeProvider` fallback fetches, and `useVariantSourceTask` to use the same helpers, so `taskQueryKeys.single(...)` readers and writers in scope no longer diverge. Targeted verification passed for the changed task hooks, generation cache facade, variant-source reader, and realtime provider fallback path. Checkpointed batch evidence to `.megaplan/plans/m3-realtime-events-store-20260417-0218/execution_batch_4.json`.
deviations: Repository worktree contains many unrelated pre-existing changes outside T4 scope; they were left untouched.

task_updates.executor_notes: Adapted the single-task data path so `useGetTask` keeps the empty-string disabled contract, `resolveTaskProjectScope()` fallback, and caller-facing return semantics while sourcing visible task data from narrow realtime-store subscriptions when available and seeding the store from cached or fetched React Query results. Routed the in-scope `taskQueryKeys.single(...)` paths through the same helpers across `useTaskPrefetch`, `usePrefetchTaskById()`, generation-task cache preload and merge helpers, `useVariantSourceTask`, and the provider fallback fetch path so React Query remains authoritative for fetch lifecycle while store snapshots stay canonical and aligned. Verified with `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/shared/hooks/tasks/__tests__/useTasks.test.ts src/shared/hooks/tasks/__tests__/useTaskPrefetch.test.ts src/shared/lib/__tests__/generationTaskCache.test.ts src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/taskDetails/useVariantSourceTask.test.ts src/shared/providers/__tests__/RealtimeProvider.test.tsx src/shared/components/TaskDetails/hooks/__tests__/useGenerationTaskDetails.test.ts`, `npx tsc --noEmit`, and grep confirming only `src/shared/hooks/tasks/useTasks.ts` now references `taskQueryKeys.single(...)` directly in `src/`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. `useGetTask`, prefetch helpers, generation-task cache preload and merge helpers, `useVariantSourceTask`, and the realtime-provider fallback fetch path now share the same task query plus store-seeding helpers. The updated path preserves `resolveTaskProjectScope()` resolution, the empty-string disabled contract, and existing hook signatures while returning store-backed snapshots for visible readers.
